s2.ptxt: Using a clip remover, remove the 13 clips and luggage compartment door cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE DOOR OPENING SWITCH ASSEMBLY (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and the luggage door opening switch assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR LOCK CYLINDER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and luggage compartment door lock cylinder assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR OUTSIDE GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the luggage compartment door outside garnish.
Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 clips and remove the luggage compartment door outside garnish.

atten4.ptxt: When removing the symbol emblem, heat the luggage compartment door outside garnish and symbol emblem using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the luggage compartment door outside garnish and symbol emblem excessively.

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the symbol emblem.
Insert a piano wire between the luggage compartment door outside garnish and symbol emblem.
Tie objects that can serve as handles (for example, wooden blocks) to both wire ends.
Pull the piano wire and scrape off the double-sided tape that holds the symbol emblem to the luggage compartment door outside garnish.

item.ptxt: If reusing the symbol emblem, take care not to damage the symbol emblem.
Be careful not to damage the luggage compartment door outside garnish.
